zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Goddard於1512年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾時，她的父親Sir John Goddard47歲，母親Elizabeth Berenger23歲。她於1531年與Sr Thomas Hinton在英國維爾爾阿爾德布恩結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1614年2月21日在英國米德萊可雷迪其享年102歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Goddard于1512年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾时，她的父亲Sir John Goddard47岁，母亲Elizabeth Berenger23岁。她于1531年与Sr Thomas Hinton在英国維爾爾阿爾德布恩结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1614年2月21日在英国米德萊可雷迪其享年102岁。

nameMeanings.name: Goddard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Godhard, a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements gōd ‘good’ or god, got ‘god’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The name was popular in Europe during the Middle Ages as a result of the fame of Saint Gotthard, an 11th-century bishop of Hildesheim who founded a hospice on the pass from Switzerland to Italy that bears his name. This surname is also borne by Ashkenazic Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.
English: perhaps occasionally a variant of the occupational name   Gothard  . The two surnames may have been much confused.
French: variant of   Godard  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Gothard
meanings: English: occupational name for a keeper of goats, from Middle English gotherde (Old English gāt ‘goat’ + hierde) ‘herdsman, keeper’.

English: variant of Goater, with excrescent -d, either a topographic name for someone who lived by a stream or ditch, from Middle English gote ‘watercourse’ + the agent suffix -(e)r, or an occupational name either from Middle English gotherde ‘goatherd’ or from Middle English goter ‘goatherd’, an agent derivative of Middle English got(e) ‘goat’ (Old English gāt).

variants.name: Godard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Reynald, Alcide, Armand, Aurel, Celine, Cyprien, Dominique, Emile, Etienne, Euclide, Gilles.
French: from the personal name Godard, of ancient Germanic origin (see Goddard ).

English (of Norman origin): variant of   Goddard  , a cognate of 1 above. This surname is also borne by Ashkenazic Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Goertz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Christoph, Erwin, Guenter, Juergen, Kurt, Otto.
German (also Görtz): patronymic from the personal name Goert, a short form of Godhard (see Goddard ), Gottfried or Gerhardt , common in Rhineland.
Germanized form (also Görtz) of Sorbian Gerc; see Gertz .

variants.name: Goodart
meanings: Perhaps also an Americanized form of German   Gothard  .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Goddard was born in 1512, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Goddard, was 47 and her mother, Elizabeth Berenger, was 23. She married Sr Thomas Hinton in 1531, in Aldbourne, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 21 February 1614, in Shoreditch, Middlesex, England, at the age of 102.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Goddard est née en 1512, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Goddard, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Berenger, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sr Thomas Hinton en 1531, à Aldbourne, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 février 1614, à Shoreditch, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 102 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Goddard 1512 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Goddard 47 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Berenger 23. Sie hat 1531 in Aldbourne, Wiltshire, England Sr Thomas Hinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Februar 1614 im Alter von 102 Jahren in Shoreditch, Middlesex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Goddard è nata il nel 1512 nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Goddard, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Berenger, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sr Thomas Hinton nel 1531, nel Aldbourne, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 21 febbraio 1614, nel Shoreditch, Middlesex, England, all'età di 102 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Goddardが1512年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Goddardは47歳，母Elizabeth Berengerは23歳であった。1531年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアアルドボウルンでSr Thomas Hintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1614年2月21日にイギリスミッドレセックスショアディトチで102歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Goddard(이)가 1512년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Goddard(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Berenger(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1531년 영국 윌츠히르 알드보우른에서 Sr Thomas Hinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1614년 2월 21일 영국 미들레세스 쇼레딧치에서 102세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Goddard nasceu em 1512, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Goddard, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Berenger, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sr Thomas Hinton em 1531, em Aldbourne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de fevereiro de 1614, em Shoreditch, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 102 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Goddard родилась в 1512 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Goddard было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Berenger, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sr Thomas Hinton в 1531 г. в местности алдбурн, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 21 февраля 1614 г. в местности шауредич, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 102 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Goddard nació en 1512, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Goddard, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Berenger, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sr Thomas Hinton en 1531, en Aldbourne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 21 de febrero de 1614, en Shoreditch, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 102 años.
